race.comment: JAZZ ALL KNIGHT (8) is progressing well this time in and looks to have a great chance today with the big weight drop. Nailed late with the 58kg when a tough on-pace second over 1200m at this track. Best figures measure up and is adept in all conditions. TIDAL RUSH (2) tough gelding with an excellent record over this course and distance. Great  return from back in the field with a slashing third over 1175m at Albury. A repeat of the latest effort will see him go close. ISCHYROS (4) on the quick backup after surprising at the big odds ($101), with a battling third over 1300m at Rosehill in Highway class on February 21. Goes well here and expected to take a hand in the finish. YOUR NOT THE BOSS (1) covered a stack of ground in the run when a poor last over 1200m at Kembla. Races well here and no shock to see him take a hand in the finish.
